trickyParts: npm OIDC trusted publishing must be configured on npmjs.com for @sjawhar/opencode-legion-envoy — without it the first real publish will fail with auth error. This is a one-time npm.js config, not a workflow issue.
Replaced sami-version/sami-release shared actions with direct tag/release commands to eliminate SHA-suffix tag format
deviations: PO requested full OMO-style overhaul of publish-envoy-plugin.yml beyond original issue scope (4 fixes). Implemented standalone manual-dispatch workflow with registry-based version computation.
Tag prefix changed from legion-envoy-v to legion-envoy-plugin-v to distinguish plugin releases from envoy binary releases
openQuestions: npm trusted publishing config needed on npmjs.com before first real publish
